meaning: vt.使新生,重建,改革,革新vi.新生,再生,起革新作用adj.新生的,更新的
examples: Once destroyed, brain cells do not regenerate.
Nerve cells have limited ability to regenerate if destroyed.
She says: "I believe that the day is not far off when we will be able to prescribe drugs that cause severed spinal cords to heal, hearts to regenerate and lost limbs to regrow."
But Sita's planning manager Gareth Phillips said it would create jobs and regenerate a brownfield site.
Rhondda Cynon Taf Council, meanwhile, points to work already taking place to regenerate the town centre.
